overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian palace complex at night. The character moves from an interior room through lush gardens to the Nile waterfront, then returns inland to approach a grand temple entrance illuminated by torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated interior room with Egyptian columns and cushions

events.description: character approaches and exits through the large wooden doorway into the garden

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit interior room toward the open doorway leading outside

entered.detail: Egyptian-style room with decorated walls and floor cushions
tall stone pillars with green and red painted bands and hieroglyphs
large terracotta pot with green foliage near the doorway
large wooden door frame leading to the exterior garden
decorative wall hangings with Egyptian motifs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside an ornately decorated Egyptian room with painted columns and cushions scattered on the floor. The character walks steadily toward a large open doorway, transitioning from the artificial interior lighting to the garden outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace garden with palm trees and fire pits

events.description: hippo becomes visible near the pool in the garden center
character turns right to follow the garden path toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit garden, passing a hippo near the water feature and continuing along the stone path

notable_agents.action: hippo standing near the pool edge, partially illuminated by firelight

entered.detail: stone-tiled walkway winding through the garden
tall date palms silhouetted against the night sky
burning braziers providing warm light along the path
low stone balustrade along the garden edge
stacked sacks near the path edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the character enters a lush garden illuminated by fire pits and moonlight. A hippo stands near a pool to the left as the character walks along the stone path, passing sandbags and palm trees while heading toward the waterfront.

events.description: garden gives way to open waterfront view of the Nile with ancient boats and cranes
character turns left away from the water to head inland through the gardens

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone path overlooking the Nile, observing the wooden cranes and boats on the water

entered.detail: large wooden construction crane on the waterfront
wide river reflecting the night sky with distant settlements visible
traditional Egyptian boats with sails docked along the shore
high crenellated stone wall running along the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal the Nile river with ancient boats and wooden cranes visible on the water. The character walks along the waterfront wall, then turns inland away from the river, moving past flowering bushes and stone fortifications.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden corridor with stone walls and reflecting pool

events.description: moving from open waterfront into enclosed garden corridor between stone walls
passing a rectangular garden pool with lily pads surrounded by flowering plants

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden corridor with stone walls and lush vegetation on both sides, passing a reflecting pool

entered.detail: ancient Egyptian structures with lit windows in the background
rectangular water feature with lily pads surrounded by stone edging
dense shrubs with red and yellow flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the Nile, the character enters a garden corridor flanked by stone walls and lush vegetation. The path passes a rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by flowering bushes, with ancient stone buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental temple entrance with grand stairs

events.description: approaching the monumental temple gate with large stairs and stone braziers
beginning to ascend the steep stone stairs toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand stairs of the temple entrance, passing NPCs standing near the top

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress standing near the temple entrance, looking around

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
massive stone pylon gateway with decorated columns and hieroglyphs
large burning bowls on stands flanking the stairs
stone guardian figures flanking the temple entrance
walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphs and reliefs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a monumental temple entrance with wide stone stairs flanked by burning braziers. As they ascend, the massive pylon gate with hieroglyphic walls and guardian statues comes into view, while NPCs stand near the entrance observing the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate interior of an Egyptian palace out through moonlit gardens and along the Nile waterfront, finally ascending toward a monumental temple. It begins inside an ornately decorated room with painted columns and cushions, moving steadily through a large open doorway as the artificial interior light gives way to the night air. As the character enters a lush garden, the scene shifts to a landscape of fire pits and palm trees, passing a hippo by a pool before the path opens up to reveal the Nile river with its ancient boats and wooden cranes. The camera then turns inland, moving away from the waterfront through garden corridors and past a rectangular reflecting pool flanked by flowering bushes. Finally, the journey culminates as the character approaches a grand temple entrance, ascending wide stone stairs lined with burning braziers toward a massive pylon gate adorned with hieroglyphics and guardian statues.
